title: LE7 4TG, Mr James Chandler: environmental permit issued - EPR/BP3323LG/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Mr James Chandler Installation name: Shoby Poultry (Fosseway site) Permit number: EPR/BP3323LG  "
